title: roboflow/supervision
summary: Roboflow’s Supervision is a Python toolkit for reusable computer-vision workflows, including detection handling, annotation, dataset utilities, counting, visualization, metrics, and integrations with model libraries.
friendlySummary: Supervision is a Python toolkit for computer-vision workflows such as detections, annotations, datasets, counting, metrics, and visualisation.
whyItMatters: It gives builders practical components for turning vision models into applications without rewriting common plumbing. Teams can use it for video analytics, dataset prep, model evaluation, and rapid CV prototypes.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It gives builders reusable pieces for turning vision models into real applications faster.
